title: WiFi-Radar-for-SLAM: Ambient WiFi as a Radar Replacement for Automotive SLAM
description: A physics-based (Sionna RT ray-traced) feasibility study and system for using ambient sub-7 GHz WiFi signals received on a moving vehicle to build a 3D scan of the surroundings usable in place of radar in SLAM pipelines. This release covers the simulation-first feasibility milestone for the sub-7 GHz path; a 60 GHz / IEEE 802.11ad mmWave extension is planned as future work.
